attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT stg_CG1_XXCFIR_ELA_IB_CREDIT_S.USER_NAME, stg_CG1_XXCFIR_ELA_IB_CREDIT_S.SO_LINE_ID, stg_CG1_XXCFIR_ELA_IB_CREDIT_S.DEAL_ID, stg_CG1_XXCFIR_ELA_IB_CREDIT_S.CONTRACT_START_DATE, stg_CG1_XXCFIR_ELA_IB_CREDIT_S.CONTRACT_END_DATE, stg_CG1_XXCFIR_ELA_IB_CREDIT_S.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID, stg_CG1_XXCFIR_ELA_IB_CREDIT_S.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID, stg_CG1_XXCFIR_ELA_IB_CREDIT_S.OA_FLAG, stg_CG1_XXCFIR_ELA_IB_CREDIT_S.TRANSACTION_ID, stg_CG1_XXCFIR_ELA_IB_CREDIT_S.ORDER_NUMBER, stg_CG1_XXCFIR_ELA_IB_CREDIT_S.ORG_ID, stg_CG1_XXCFIR_ELA_IB_CREDIT_S.PROCESS_STATUS, stg_CG1_XXCFIR_ELA_IB_CREDIT_S.INV_STATUS, stg_CG1_XXCFIR_ELA_IB_CREDIT_S.CM_STATUS, stg_CG1_XXCFIR_ELA_IB_CREDIT_S.DM_STATUS, stg_CG1_XXCFIR_ELA_IB_CREDIT_S.RMA_STATUS, stg_CG1_XXCFIR_ELA_IB_CREDIT_S.VIP_REBATE_STATUS, stg_CG1_XXCFIR_ELA_IB_CREDIT_S.TWO_TIER_STATUS, stg_CG1_XXCFIR_ELA_IB_CREDIT_S.ATTRIBUTE1, stg_CG1_XXCFIR_ELA_IB_CREDIT_S.ATTRIBUTE2, stg_CG1_XXCFIR_ELA_IB_CREDIT_S.ATTRIBUTE3, stg_CG1_XXCFIR_ELA_IB_CREDIT_S.ATTRIBUTE4, stg_CG1_XXCFIR_ELA_IB_CREDIT_S.ATTRIBUTE5, stg_CG1_XXCFIR_ELA_IB_CREDIT_S.ATTRIBUTE6, stg_CG1_XXCFIR_ELA_IB_CREDIT_S.ATTRIBUTE7, stg_CG1_XXCFIR_ELA_IB_CREDIT_S.ATTRIBUTE8, stg_CG1_XXCFIR_ELA_IB_CREDIT_S.CREATED_BY, stg_CG1_XXCFIR_ELA_IB_CREDIT_S.CREATION_DATE, stg_CG1_XXCFIR_ELA_IB_CREDIT_S.LAST_UPDATED_BY, stg_CG1_XXCFIR_ELA_IB_CREDIT_S.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, stg_CG1_XXCFIR_ELA_IB_CREDIT_S.INV_COUNT, stg_CG1_XXCFIR_ELA_IB_CREDIT_S.CM_COUNT, stg_CG1_XXCFIR_ELA_IB_CREDIT_S.DM_COUNT, stg_CG1_XXCFIR_ELA_IB_CREDIT_S.ORG_RULE_START_DATE, stg_CG1_XXCFIR_ELA_IB_CREDIT_S.ORG_RULE_END_DATE, stg_CG1_XXCFIR_ELA_IB_CREDIT_S.ORG_ACCT_RULE_DURATION, stg_CG1_XXCFIR_ELA_IB_CREDIT_S.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, stg_CG1_XXCFIR_ELA_IB_CREDIT_S.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, stg_CG1_XXCFIR_ELA_IB_CREDIT_S.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, stg_CG1_XXCFIR_ELA_IB_CREDIT_S.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
$$ACCUMSTGDB.stg_CG1_XXCFIR_ELA_IB_CREDIT_S stg_CG1_XXCFIR_ELA_IB_CREDIT_S,
(
select SO_LINE_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.stg_CG1_XXCFIR_ELA_IB_CREDIT_S
minus
select SO_LINE_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_XXCFIR_ELA_IB_CREDIT_STG
) ACM
where 
 ACM.SO_LINE_ID = stg_CG1_XXCFIR_ELA_IB_CREDIT_S.SO_LINE_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=stg_CG1_XXCFIR_ELA_IB_CREDIT_S.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_XXCFIR_ELA_IB_CREDIT_STG)
